description_long: This is a three-seater sofa upholstered in a warm, medium brown fabric with a slightly worn, matte finish. The sofa features three large, plush seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be attached and uniformly sized. The armrests are wide, padded, and gently slope outward, providing a comfortable resting area for arms. The backrest is straight and continuous, matching the length of the seat, and the overall silhouette is boxy yet inviting. The legs are not visible, suggesting they are either recessed or the sofa sits low to the ground. The upholstery is solid in color with a soft, velvety texture and no visible decorative patterns or stitching.
description: A medium brown, three-seater sofa with plush, attached cushions and wide, padded armrests. The upholstery is solid and velvety, with a boxy, inviting silhouette.
description_view_0: Front view showing three large seat and back cushions, wide padded armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Angled rear-side view highlighting the backrest's straight, continuous form and the outward slope of the armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the sofa's straight back and the subtle overhang of the backrest cushions.
description_view_3: Side-front view emphasizing the depth of the seat cushions and the thickness of the armrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, attached seat cushions and three matching attached backrest cushions, all uniform in size and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, padded armrests with a gently outward-sloping profile, extending slightly above the seat height and lacking decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a recessed or hidden design, possibly with a low ground clearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, continuous backrest with three attached, plush cushions matching the seat width and height.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid brown upholstery with a soft, velvety texture and no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
